home.name: Nurmuhammad
home.description: I build modern, scalable web applications. Specializing in Vue.js, React, Node.js — from clean frontends to solid backends.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.p13_full: Full-stack project and task management app. Kanban board, drag-drop, team collaboration, Google OAuth, i18n (EN/RU/UZ), dark/light theme, file attachments, notifications, and live dashboard stats.

technologies.title: Technologies
technologies.html_desc: A markup language that allows you to create the structure of web pages using tags and elements.
technologies.css_desc: A styling language that defines the visual appearance of web pages — colors, fonts and layout.
technologies.js_desc: Allows creating animations, handling events and communicating with the server.
technologies.sass_desc: A CSS preprocessor that adds variables, nested selectors and mixins to simplify styling.
technologies.ts_desc: A typed superset of JavaScript that catches errors at compile time and improves code quality at scale.
technologies.tailwind_desc: Utility-first CSS framework that speeds up interface development with ready-made classes.
technologies.webpack_desc: Simplifies dependency management and improves performance by bundling files for the browser.
technologies.gulp_desc: Automates build tasks such as file minification, Sass compilation and image optimization.
technologies.vue_desc: A progressive JavaScript framework for building interactive user interfaces.
technologies.react_desc: A JavaScript library for building fast, component-based user interfaces with a virtual DOM.
technologies.nuxt_desc: Full-featured Vue.js-based framework with SSR, automatic routing and optimization.
technologies.next_desc: React-based framework with SSR, SSG, file-based routing and built-in image optimization.
technologies.vite_desc: A next-generation build tool with lightning-fast HMR and optimized production builds.
technologies.node_desc: A JavaScript runtime built on Chrome's V8 engine for building fast and scalable server-side applications.
technologies.express_desc: A minimal and flexible Node.js web framework for building APIs and web applications quickly.
technologies.nest_desc: A progressive Node.js framework for building efficient, scalable server-side applications with TypeScript.
technologies.pg_desc: A powerful open-source relational database with advanced features like JSON support and full-text search.
technologies.mysql_desc: The world's most popular open-source relational database, widely used in web applications.
technologies.mongo_desc: A NoSQL document database that stores data in flexible JSON-like documents for rapid development.
technologies.redis_desc: An in-memory data structure store used as a database, cache, and message broker for high performance.
technologies.rn_desc: A framework for building native iOS and Android apps using React and JavaScript.
technologies.ionic_desc: A cross-platform mobile app framework that uses web technologies to build native-quality mobile apps.
technologies.docker_desc: A platform for developing, shipping and running applications in isolated containers.
technologies.git_desc: A distributed version control system for tracking changes, collaborating and managing source code.

about.title: About
about.heading: I build web apps that
about.bio1: Hi! I'm Nurmuhammad — a Full Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience. I build modern, scalable web applications using Vue.js, React, Node.js and more.
about.bio2: I've shipped production systems for universities, medical clinics, and logistics companies. Each project gets a proper architecture, clean code, and attention to performance.
about.exp0_desc: Full-stack web development — corporate sites, dashboards, APIs, and online stores
about.exp1_desc: Intellectual Software Engineering (bdm.uz), Fergana — web apps, automation, mentoring
about.exp2_desc: Nordic International University, Tashkent — online testing platform
about.svc0_desc: Representative websites for companies with modern design and SEO optimization.
about.svc1_desc: Full-featured stores with a catalog, cart and payment system.
about.svc2_desc: High-conversion single-page websites for promoting products and services.
about.svc3_desc: Data-rich admin interfaces with charts, tables, role-based access control.
about.svc4_desc: Node.js / Express.js APIs with authentication, database integration, and business logic.
about.svc5_desc: Creating clean, user-friendly interfaces with a focus on conversion and usability.

values.speed_desc: I meet deadlines and work efficiently.

seo.home_title: Nurmuhammad Nizomov — Full Stack Developer | Vue.js, React, Node.js
seo.home_desc: Full Stack Web Developer from Fergana, Uzbekistan. Building modern web apps with Vue.js, React, Node.js, Express.js, MySQL, PostgreSQL.
seo.portfolio_desc: Projects: university management systems, medical platforms, online stores, dashboards, and landing pages.
seo.technologies_desc: Full stack: Vue.js, Nuxt.js, React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Docker and more.
seo.about_desc: Full Stack Developer with 3+ years at Intellectual Software Engineering. Building scalable web apps for real businesses.
seo.contacts_desc: Contact Nurmuhammad for web development: corporate sites, online stores, dashboards or APIs. Based in Fergana, Uzbekistan.
